phase-1.name: MVP Implementation Execution
phase-1.summary: Granular execution checkpoints for the 3-repo AI Architect MVP build.

phase-2.name: Geometry Layer 2 & Full Deliverable Expansion
phase-2.summary: Phase 2 expands the product from schematic package outputs to design development deliverables with Layer 2 geometry, schedules, DXF, IFC foundation, and integration QA.

phase-3.name: Package-Centric Design Development Hardening
phase-3.summary: Phase 3 introduced the package-centric DD export lane, KTS issue gate, DXF/IFC bundle, and production validation baseline, but several locked prerequisites are still only partially covered.

phase-4.name: AI Needs Clarification, Design Board, and Intake UX Revamp
phase-4.summary: Phase 4 upgrades the discovery flow from MVP chat/form intake to a market-grade AI clarification workflow with structured requirement locking, design-direction board, and Vietnamese-first UX.
